name: Zoe Aitinkerer
title: Machine Learning Engineer · Prototyper
tagline: Carries three notebooks and trusts none of their outputs blindly.
factoids: Builds evaluation sets before polishing demos.
Teaches a workshop on finding confident nonsense in model output.
jokes: The model hallucinated a shorter coffee line, so I followed it.
My prompt has seventeen examples and one unresolved identity crisis.

interaction.greeting: Hi! Want to compare evaluation failures or coffee recommendations?
dialogue: A polished demo is not evidence of reliable behavior.
Write down what success means before changing the prompt again.
